---
title: "Application Proof Audit"
---

This appendix collects the representative application theorem cards that were moved out of the [Applications](index.qmd) overview. The overview is for choosing a learning track; this page is for checking the current finite proved seeds across those tracks.

::: {.warning-box}
Application theorem cards certify finite models, wrappers, or contract facts only at their stated scope. The cards are not proof artifacts, not performance claims, and not model-quality claims; they do not prove physics realism, global optimality, runtime improvement, or real-world performance.
:::

## Data, Compute, Rendering, Layout, And Sampling

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPC-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPR-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPL-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPS-T0004"></div>

## AI Seeds And Contracts

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIA-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0010"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0069"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0073"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0074"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0075"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0076"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0077"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0078"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0079"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0033"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0024"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIT-T0078"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIT-T0090"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIT-T0091"></div>

## Where To Go Next

- [AI Contract Suite](ai_contract_suite.qmd) for the compact proof-carrying AI entry point.
- [AI Contract Ladder Proof Audit](ai_contract_ladder_audit.qmd) for the focused AI theorem trail.
- [Theorem Index](../../theorems.qmd) for the generated complete theorem registry.

<div class="book-navigation">
<a href="index.qmd">Back: Applications</a>
<a href="erdos_bridges.qmd">Next: Classical Bridges</a>
</div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
